alt: Black-and-white 1866 lithograph showing Spanish ships at left bombarding the Callao shoreline while Peruvian defenders man cannons along an earthwork battery beneath a Peruvian flag at right
description: 1866 lithograph by L. Cappa depicting the Spanish naval bombardment of Callao and the defense by Peruvian forces at Real Felipe Fortress and the surrounding shore batteries. Library of Congress reproduction number cph.3c36429.
photographer: L. Cappa (lithograph artist); LOT 4831, Library of Congress Prints & Photographs Division
title: Bombardment of Callao, May 2, 1866
